title: Miami Heat Wave
lead: Miami is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.06. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Miami has reached critical levels, with a Z-Score of +3.06, far exceeding the normal range. 
 The city is seeing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 9.7 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The humidity level is at 79%, and the wind speed is 8.9 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
